memoryArtifacts.headline: William Moulton and Margaret Page by Myrtle S. Hyde

popularStory.headline: Life Sketch of William Moulton
popularStory.description:
William was born in 1617 in Ormsby, Norfolk, England.  He was the son of John Moulton and Mary Smith.

     In April 1637, William came to America.  He came from Ormsby with the family of Robert Pag …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Moulton I於大約1617年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特時，他的父親Benjamin Moulton27歲，母親Mary24歲。他於1651年與Margaret Page在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1637年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓。他去世於1664年4月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓享年48歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Moulton I于大约1617年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特时，他的父亲Benjamin Moulton27岁，母亲Mary24岁。他于1651年与Margaret Page在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1637年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓。他去世于1664年4月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓享年48岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: When William Moulton I was born about 1617, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Benjamin Moulton, was 27 and his mother, Mary, was 24. He married Margaret Page in 1651, in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America in 1637. He died on 18 April 1664, in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 48, and was buried in Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Moulton I est né environ 1617, à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Benjamin Moulton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Page en 1651, à Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Hampton, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1637. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1664, à Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Moulton I è nato il circa 1617 nel Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Benjamin Moulton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mary, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Page nel 1651, nel Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America nel 1637. Morì il 18 aprile 1664, nel Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Moulton Iが約1617年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットで生まれた時，父Benjamin Moultonは27歳，母Maryは24歳であった。1651年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクハンプトンでMargaret Pageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1637年にはイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアハンプトンに住んでいた。彼は1664年4月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクハンプトンで48歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムハンプトンピン グローブ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 마거릿
ko.Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴
ko.lifeSummary: William Moulton I(이)가 대략 1617년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Benjamin Moulton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1651년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 함프턴에서 Margaret Page(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1637년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 함프턴에서 살았다. 그는 1664년 4월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 함프턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴 핀 그로브 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Moulton I nasceu aproximadamente 1617, em Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Benjamin Moulton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Page em 1651, em Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America em 1637. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1664, em Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ru.Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial: хамптон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: хамптон, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham: паин гров кеметири, хамптон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: ормесби ст маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: бостон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Moulton I родился около 1617 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Benjamin Moulton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Page в 1651 г. в местности хамптон, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности хамптон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1637 году. Он умер 18 апреля 1664 г. в местности хамптон, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности паин гров кеметири, хамптон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Moulton I nació aproximadamente 1617, en Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Benjamin Moulton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret Page en 1651, en Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America en 1637. Murió el 18 de abril de 1664, en Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.
